geographic_restrictions: Global (with a focus on institutions capable of conducting Progeria-related research)
project_area: Hutchinson-Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS) and related laminopathies, including cardiovascular disease, cellular aging, and therapeutic interventions
demographic_requirements: Research must focus on Hutchinson-Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS) or related premature aging disorders. Priority given to studies involving HGPS patients, cells, or animal models.
eligibility_summary: Open to researchers worldwide working on Progeria-related research. Eligible applicants include academic institutions, research centers, non-profits, and biotechnology companies. Projects must align with PRF's mission to discover treatments and the cure for Progeria and to understand the biology of the disease. No geographic restrictions, but applicants must demonstrate expertise in Progeria or related fields.
